tool.name: GaCDI GDC
tool.description: import datasets from the NCI Genomic Data Commons
tool.command: @CMD_PREAMBLE@ gacdi gdc --input-mode '$input.mode' #if $input.mode == 'bundle' --manifest '$input.manifest' --metadata '$input.metadata' --provenance '$input.provenance' #if $input.allow_raw_mixed --set allow_raw_mixed=true #end if #else if $input.mode == 'manifest' --manifest '$input.manifest' --set legacy_access='$input.access' #else --query-json '$input.query_json' #end if --transfer-report '$transfer_report' --dataset-map '$dataset_map' --galaxy-metadata 'galaxy.json' --imported-metadata '$imported_metadata' --import-provenance '$import_provenance' --retry-manifest '$retry_manifest' --retry-metadata '$retry_metadata' --retry-provenance '$retry_provenance' @TOKEN_ARG@ @COMMON_ARGS@

param.name: mode
param.label: Selection source
param.option: Canonical selection bundle (from GaCDI Manifest Builder)
Legacy direct GDC API query (JSON filters)

param.name: manifest
param.label: Canonical selection manifest
param.help: The selection_manifest output from GaCDI Manifest Builder (GDC).

param.name: metadata
param.label: Canonical selection metadata
param.help: The matching selection_metadata output from the same builder run.

param.name: provenance
param.label: Selection provenance
param.help: The matching selection_provenance output. Its hashes bind the other two inputs and prevent accidental cohort mixing.

param.name: allow_raw_mixed
param.label: Allow an explicitly heterogeneous raw collection
param.help: Leave disabled for analysis-ready collections. Enable only when the bundle intentionally has payload_profile=raw_mixed and downstream tools will handle its mixed datatypes.

param.name: manifest
param.label: GDC manifest
param.help: A manifest exported from the GDC Data Portal (columns: id, filename, md5, size, state).

param.name: access
param.label: Access level of every file in this legacy manifest
param.help: Legacy manifests do not record access. Declare it explicitly so controlled data cannot begin without credential preflight.

param.name: query_json
param.label: GDC query JSON
param.help: A JSON document containing a GDC 'filters' object for the files endpoint. May also set 'size' and 'fields'.

data.name: imported_metadata
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: imported metadata by collection element

tool.help:
**GaCDI — Genomic Data Commons (GDC) importer**
Downloads files from the NCI `Genomic Data Commons <https://gdc.cancer.gov/>`_ into your Galaxy history using the official ``gdc-client``.
**Selection source**
- *Canonical selection bundle* — connect the manifest, metadata, and provenance outputs from **GaCDI Manifest Builder (GDC)**. The downloader validates the three files together before any transfer. This is the normal workflow path. - *Legacy GDC portal manifest* — compatibility mode for manifests exported from the `GDC Data Portal <https://portal.gdc.cancer.gov/>`_. Because that format has no access field, you must explicitly declare all rows open or controlled. - *Legacy direct API query* — compatibility mode for a JSON ``filters`` object.
The downloaded collection uses explicit tool-provided member metadata, so element identifiers and Galaxy datatypes do not depend on filename suffix guessing. The asset transfer report records one row per selected remote asset; the dataset map records one row per collection element and is the stable join point for workflows. Imported metadata carries that element join into the biological table. Import provenance records execution policy and result counts. Failed canonical assets are emitted as a new hash-bound retry manifest/metadata/provenance bundle that can be connected back to this tool without editing.
**Controlled access**
For controlled-access files, upload your GDC download token and select it in *Controlled-access token file*. Downloaded controlled data and the token dataset must be handled in accordance with your Data Use Agreement. @HELP_FOOTER@
